basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer and Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Engineer and Project Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max 45 years for Project Engineer, Max 35 years for Project Assistant.
age_limit.details: Project Engineer: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Project Assistant: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D/M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent for Project Engineer; M.Tech/M.E. or B.Tech for Project Assistant.
qualification.details: Project Engineer: Ph.D/M.Tech/M.E. or equivalent in Electrical Engineering with relevant experience. Hands-on experience in DC/DC converters, power electronics-based chargers, and MATLAB/Simulink modeling is preferred. Experience in smart energy systems, EV charging infrastructure, embedded systems, energy metering, and familiarity with communication protocols (RS485, CAN, Modbus, UART) will be an added advantage. Project Assistant: M.Tech/M.E. or B.Tech in Electrical Engineering with relevant experience. Strong knowledge of smart energy systems, power electronics, embedded systems, EV charging, hardware interfacing, and communication protocols (RS485, Modbus, CAN, UART, SPI, I2C) is required. Experience with smart meters, EMS, renewable energy integration, EV chargers, and IoT-based energy monitoring will be an added advantage.

salary_details.pay_scale: Project Engineer: Rs. 40000-75000 (without HRA); Project Assistant: Rs. 28000-41000 (without HRA).
salary_details.details: Project Engineer: Rs. 40000-75000 (without HRA) Project Assistant: Rs. 28000-41000 (without HRA)

selection_process: Offline interview (details will be communicated after applications are received)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Bhilai Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Bhilai to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Project Engineer and Project Assistant posts at IIT Bhilai is 20th May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer and Project Assistant?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by IIT Bhilai for the recruitment drive. One vacancy is for the post of Project Engineer and the other is for Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Engineer?
faq.answer: For the Project Engineer position, candidates must possess a Ph.D, M.Tech, M.E., or an equivalent degree in Electrical Engineering, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Assistant?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 35 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Engineer?
faq.answer: The Project Engineer will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 75,000 per month, excluding HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Engineer and Project Assistant roles at IIT Bhilai will involve an offline interview. Further details will be communicated after the applications are received.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online for the IIT Bhilai recruitment. The application needs to be submitted through the provided Google Form link.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Engineer and Project Assistant at IIT Bhilai are project-based roles, indicating they are for specific research projects.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the Important Links section of this article. You can also visit the official website of IIT Bhilai for more information.
